home.title: LeetCode - The World's Leading Programming Learning Platform
home.description: A New Way to Learn. LeetCode is the best platform to help you enhance your skills, expand your knowledge and prepare for technical interviews.

userMenu.getPremium: Access all features with our Premium subscription!

easterEgg.rewardMessage: Congratulations! You just found 10 LeetCoins. Happy LeetCoding!

medal.saveImgMobile: Long press to save the image
medal.medalEmpty: Sorry, there are no medals to grab right now.

codeReplay.title: Code Replay
codeReplay.redirectContent: This account belongs to LeetCode China. Would you like to view it on leetcode.cn?

common.blockDescription: They won't be able to follow you, view your profile, or interact with your posts or comments. You won't see their posts or comments either.

username.confirmChangeTitle: Are you sure you want to change your LeetCode ID?

You can only change your LeetCode ID once every 90 days.
You will no longer be able to login with your old LeetCode ID

username.successNotification: LeetCode ID has been changed successfully!
username.cannotChangeTip: Username can only be changed once in 90 days

404.title: 力扣
404.message: 抱歉！我们找不到您想访问的页面...

home.title: 力扣 (LeetCode) 全球极客挚爱的技术成长平台
home.description: 海量技术面试题库，拥有算法、数据结构、系统设计等 1000+题目，帮助你高效提升编程技能，轻松拿下世界 IT 名企 Dream Offer。

userMenu.getPremium: 升级 Plus 会员享专属特权

streakCounter.unfinished: 解决今天的「每日 1 题」，刷新你的连胜记录！
streakCounter.missedOneDayThisMonth: 这个月你错过了 1 天.
streakCounter.missedDaysThisMonth: 这个月你错过了 {{count}} 天.

common.verifiedRequired: 请绑定手机号或者邮箱后继续操作

common.maybeVerifiedRequired: 请绑定手机号后继续操作
common.//maybeVerifiedRequired: maybeVerifiedRequired means email in LCUS and phone in LCCN

easterEgg.rewardMessage: 恭喜您获得了 10 积分，Happy LeetCoding!

common.chromeNotSupport: 当前浏览器版本较低，可能导致部分功能无法正常使用。建议升级至最新版本，享受更流畅的体验。
common.lcAppWebviewNotSupport: 检测到当前内置浏览器版本过低，可能无法正常预览页面。您可以复制链接并在浏览器中打开查看。

codeReplay.title: 代码回放
codeReplay.redirectContent: 此非力扣中国用户，前往 leetcode.com 查看详情?

common.blockDescription: 对方将无法关注你，无法查看或回复你的主页、帖子、题解和评论，也无法与你互动。对方不会收到被拉黑的通知。你也不会再看到对方的帖子、题解和评论。
